metadata.title: Huajiuan Allinium — EOSS glass facades, metal facades, external insulation
metadata.description: Huajiuan Allinium is the official distributor of Huajian Aluminium Mongolia's EOSS brand in Mongolia, supplying professional facade, insulation and construction fittings solutions.

hero.title: EOSS Glass Facade & Windows — The Future of Building Envelopes
hero.subtitle: We officially introduce, sell and install Huajian Aluminium Mongolia's EOSS glass facade and window systems in Mongolia. Quality, standards and performance are our promise.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: All external finishing solutions in one place

glass.title: EOSS Glass Facade
glass.description: Passive House certified glass facade engineered for Mongolia's -40°C to +40°C climate.

metalWindow.title: Metal Thermal Window
metalWindow.description: Passive House certified EOSS brand 100mm best-seller metal thermal window.

metal.title: Metal Facade
metal.description: Alucobond and aluminium composite panel finishes with flexible design and long-lasting durability.

insulation.title: External Insulation
insulation.description: Rockwool-compliant thermal and acoustic insulation for energy-efficient buildings.

equipment.title: Fittings & Accessories
equipment.description: Steel brackets, rubber gaskets, drainage profiles and all supporting accessories.

lowE.title: Low-E Glass Features
lowE.intro: Low-E glass engineered for Mongolia reduces heat loss at -40°C in winter and blocks solar heat at +40°C in summer. Products meet EN 673, ASTM E2190, CSA A440.2 and other cold-climate international standards.
lowE.standards: ASTM E2190 • EN 1279-2 • EN 673 • CSA A440.2 • GOST 30674 • Passive House certified
lowE.note: Tinted glass + light transmission reduction available. Technical specs may vary by product type.

about.title: Your trusted partner for building envelopes
about.intro: With more than 4 years of local experience, Huajiuan Allinium supplies and installs premium glass facades, metal facades, external insulation and construction accessories across Mongolia.
about.partnership: We are the official distributor of Huajian Aluminium Mongolia's EOSS brand in Mongolia, introducing, selling and installing its certified facade systems backed by 26 years of global aluminium expertise.

gallery.title: Projects
gallery.subtitle: Completed works built with Huajian Aluminium Mongolia / EOSS systems.

blog.title: News
blog.subtitle: Industry news, brand highlights and technical advice

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our team for your project and request a competitive quote.

cta.title: Ready to start your project?
cta.subtitle: Our professional team will prepare a tailored solution and competitive quote for your requirements.

footer.tagline: EOSS glass facades, metal facades, external insulation — quality, standards, performance.

chatbot.title: Huajian Aluminium Mongolia
chatbot.subtitle: Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hello! We provide building envelope solutions: glass facades, metal windows, metal facades and insulation. How can I help?

responses.glass: EOSS glass facade — Passive House certified, engineered for -40°C to +40°C, with double/triple Low-E glazing.
responses.metalWindows: EOSS ES101 metal thermal window — 101 mm frame, Uw 0.79 W/m²K, triple Low-E + Argon glass.
responses.metalFacade: Alucobond metal facade — fire-resistant aluminium composite panel, 80+ colours and finishes.
responses.insulation: Rockwool external insulation — thermal and acoustic insulation for energy-efficient buildings.
responses.quote: To request a quote, please fill out the form below. We will contact you soon.
responses.formLink: Please click the button below to open the contact form.
responses.contact: You can reach us using the details below:
responses.prices: EOSS glass facade 850,000 – 1,600,000 MNT/m², Unitized Glass System 1,800,000 – 3,000,000 MNT/m², EOSS metal windows 950,000 – 2,350,000 MNT/m², Alucobond metal facade 400,000 – 650,000 MNT/m². Final price depends on project size, materials and installation conditions.
responses.priceList: We offer EOSS glass facade 850,000 – 1,600,000 MNT/m², Unitized Glass System 1,800,000 – 3,000,000 MNT/m², EOSS metal windows 950,000 – 2,350,000 MNT/m², Alucobond metal facade 400,000 – 650,000 MNT/m². Share project details for an exact quote.
responses.fallback: Sorry, I didn't fully understand. Please choose one of the options below.
